title: Sollitharavaa Lyrics Majaa
stanzas:
Sollitharavaa sollitharavaa
mella mella va va va arugaa

kadhal thottil pazhakkam
neelum kattil varaikkum
kaaman veettu
thaazh therikkum

aann penn ulla varaikkum
kadhal kannai maraikkum
theeyil kooda
thaen irukkum

kadhal mazhai thoorume
kattil kappal aadume
penmai thadumaarume
maanam kappal aerume

aettup ppadangal yedhum
illa veettup padam idhu

Sollitharavaa sollitharavaa
mella mella va va va arugaa

aasai aarivittadhu
naan kummi kottudhu
mogam ennum
mull thaithadhu

vaarthai uchchu kottudhu
paarvai pachchai kottudhu
megam engum thael kottudhu

paarvai enai theendume
kaigal ellai thaandume
poovai thodum nerame
puththi maari pogume

ingae en kadhal
sollum ellaame engae
nee kattradhu.

Sollitharavaa sollitharavaa
mella mella va va va arugaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sollitharavaa?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the longing for a loved one, emphasizing the beauty of love.

What is the plot context of Majaa related to this song?

This song is featured in a romantic setting within the movie, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Sollitharavaa?

The song is sung by Madhu Balakrishnan and Sadhana Sargam, both renowned for their melodious voices.

Who composed the music for Sollitharavaa?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by Vidyasagar, known for his captivating melodies.

When was Sollitharavaa released?

The song was released on November 2, 2005, as part of the movie Majaa.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sollitharavaa, the romantic duet unfolds a tender narrative of love and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Majaa. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of warmth and affection, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack. As the singers harmonize beautifully, listeners are transported into a world of romance and bliss. This song serves as a celebration of love, making it ideal for special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sollitharavaa from the movie Majaa is a melodious duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Madhu Balakrishnan and Sadhana Sargam, this song is a delightful treat for music lovers. The captivating composition by Vidyasagar adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for anyone celebrating love.
stanzaMeanings: Don't say no, don't turn away, you're beautiful.
I think of you every day, don't push me away, my life.
Don't say no, don't turn away, you're beautiful.
In love's cradle, until the bed, desire will flow.
Until the man and woman come together, love will hide the eyes, even in fire, there is sweetness.
Love rains down, the bed becomes a ship, femininity will rise and pride will sail.
There are no rules here, this is a home movie.
Don't say no, don't turn away, you're beautiful.
Desire has been revealed, I am singing, the thorn of longing has pricked me.
Words are spoken loudly, the gaze gives green, clouds shower everywhere.
Your gaze will attract me, your hands will give me flowers, the moment will change.
Here, everything my love says is what you have taught me.
Don't say no, don't turn away, you're beautiful.
I think of you every day, don't push me away, my life.
